name: DAG Smoke Graph Check
description: Minimal DAG validation pipeline covering one-to-many fan-out and many-to-one fan-in with markdown aggregation.

nodes.name: Source
nodes.prompt:
You are the source node in a DAG smoke-test pipeline. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# DAG Source
TOKEN: DAG_SMOKE_TOKEN_20260325
SOURCE_STATUS: OK
NEXT: branch-a and branch-b must both see this token.

nodes.name: Branch A
nodes.prompt:
You are branch A in a DAG smoke-test pipeline. Read the aggregated upstream outputs. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# Branch A
BRANCH_A_TOKEN_SEEN: <copied token>
BRANCH_A_STATUS: OK if the token DAG_SMOKE_TOKEN_20260325 is present, otherwise FAILED

nodes.name: Branch B
nodes.prompt:
You are branch B in a DAG smoke-test pipeline. Read the aggregated upstream outputs. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# Branch B
BRANCH_B_TOKEN_SEEN: <copied token>
BRANCH_B_STATUS: OK if the token DAG_SMOKE_TOKEN_20260325 is present, otherwise FAILED

nodes.name: Merge
nodes.prompt:
You are the merge node in a DAG smoke-test pipeline. Read all aggregated upstream outputs. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# DAG Merge
MERGE_SAW_BRANCH_A: YES if branch A output is present, otherwise NO
MERGE_SAW_BRANCH_B: YES if branch B output is present, otherwise NO
MERGE_TOKEN: <copied token>
DAG_SMOKE_STATUS: OK only if both branch outputs are present and both branch statuses are OK; otherwise FAILED
